description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a landscaped yard, featuring a long, rectangular main building with a dark gable roof and a prominent chimney. The front facade is accented by a covered porch, flanked by flowering shrubs and a paved walkway leading to the street. To one side, there is a detached garage with a matching roof, and a driveway connecting it to the main road. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor seating, a small pool, and mature trees providing shade. The property is enclosed by a low fence and bordered by well-maintained lawns and garden beds. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern along the front and sides, enhancing the home's inviting appearance.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, covered porch, detached garage, and landscaped yard featuring a patio, pool, and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and landscaped front yard with flowering shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, backyard patio, pool, and mature trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, patio area, pool, and garden beds.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch, driveway, and additional landscaping with trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
